class src.interface.DataContainer(n=1000)[source]

Bases: object

class src.interface.TopticaSocket(ip: str, running: Event, connected: Event, cmd_ack: Event, buffer_emptied: Event, range_changed: Event, acq_running: Event, avg_data: Event)[source]

Bases: object

static ping(host: str)[source]

determines whether a device is connected or not

Parameters:

host – IP address as a string

Returns: True for connected, False for not connected

run_conf_tcp(cmd_queue: Queue)[source]

Config TCP thread on port 6341. This handles all the configurations for the device.

Parameters:

cmd_queue – Queue from main thread with all the interactive

Returns:

run_tcp_dat(cmd_queue: Queue, config_queue: Queue)[source]

Data TCP thread on port 6342. This handles receives all the streamed data from the device and decodes it.

wait_for_answer(client: <module 'socket' from '/Users/linus/.pyenv/versions/3.10.10/lib/python3.10/socket.py'>, length: int = 1024)[source]

waits for the device to acknowledge the previously sent command

Parameters:

  • client – socket object

  • length – length of the buffer

Returns: True for valid response, False for error

src.teraflash module

Copyright (c) 2026 Linus Leo Stöckli

This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License. To view a copy of this license, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/

class src.teraflash.TeraFlash(ip: str = '169.254.84.101', rng: int = 50, t_begin: float = 1000.0, antenna_range: float = 1000.0, avg: int = 2, log_file=None)[source]

Bases: object

auto_pulse_detection(lower: int, upper: int, detection_window: int = 100, detection_avg: int = 10)[source]

Auto detection function of pulse. Spectrometer needs to be running (laser, emitter, acq) before calling this

Parameters:

  • lower – lower end of detection window

  • upper – upper end of detection window

  • detection_window – detection window width

  • detection_avg – detection avg to smooth out noise

Returns:

detected pulse or None

disconnect()[source]

disconnects from the device, order of calls is important!

extract_tia_sens(text: str) → list[float][source]

Extracts TIA-Sens(nA) values from the given string. Returns a list of floats, or None if not found.

static get_data()[source]
static get_n_avg()[source]
static get_status()[source]
get_sys_monitor()[source]

this is repeatedly called in the official application

get_sys_status()[source]

request the system status string

static nearest_entry(t_range: float, available_ranges: list)[source]
Parameters:

  • t_range – range provided by the user

  • available_ranges – available ranges

Returns: the nearest available range to the provided range

reset_acq_avg()[source]

resets the acquisition moving average to be performed by the device

static reset_tcp_avg()[source]
set_acq_avg(avg: int = 2)[source]

sets the width of the moving average to be performed by the device

Parameters:

avg – The desired averages

set_acq_begin(t_begin: float = 1000.0)[source]

sets the start time of the time domain window.

Parameters:

t_begin – The desired start time

set_acq_range(t_range: float = 50.0)[source]

sets the range/width in the time domain window. available: 5, 10, 15, 20, 35, 50, 70, 100, 120, 150 or 200

Parameters:

t_range – The desired range

set_acq_start()[source]

start the acquisition (data streaming)

set_acq_stop()[source]

stop the acquisition (data streaming)

set_antenna_range(antenna_range: float)[source]

sets the antenna range by value (needs to be an allowed value of the instrument)

set_antenna_range_index(i)[source]

sets the antenna range by index

set_channel(channel: str = 'D')[source]

sets dual or single channel mode

Parameters:

channel – The desired mode

set_emitter(emitter: int, state: bool)[source]

sets the state of the emitter ON or OFF

Parameters:

  • emitter – Emitter 1 or 2

  • state – True for ON, False for OFF

set_laser(state: bool)[source]

sets the laser mode ON or OFF

Parameters:

state – True for ON, False for OFF

set_mode(motion: str = 'NORMAL')[source]

sets the motion mode

Parameters:

motion – The desired motion mode

set_transmission(transmission: str = 'SLIDING')[source]

sets the desired transmission mode

Parameters:

transmission – the desired transmission mode. “SLIDING” or “BLOCK”

setup()[source]

performs the setup sequence of the device as reconstructed by using wireshark on the official application

wait_for_avg()[source]
